name: thai-token-optimizer
description: Thai Token Optimizer v2.0 — adaptive Thai token optimization for Codex using lifecycle hooks, compact Thai policy, MTP-aware compression guidance, quality checks, and safety preservation.

interface.shortDescription: Compact Thai + safety-aware Codex hooks for TTO v2.0
interface.longDescription: Thai Token Optimizer v2.0 adds Codex lifecycle hooks, compact Thai behavior, safety classification, exact preservation of commands/paths/errors, MTP/speculative compression guidance, quality score, coach mode, ops analytics, fleet audit, checkpoint/cache/context commands, and rollback-first workflows.
